text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I heard a student call out to me, and the 
minute I turned around, she shoved these 
chocolates in my hands…

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Then she ran off. I didn't even 
have time to think.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
…Her form was pretty good though. 
What class is she in…?
